channel.title: PostgreSQL on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in PostgreSQL on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: SQL MCP Server
item.description:
SQL MCP Server is now generally available. It provides a secure, high-performance way to build agentic solutions with controlled access to production data, and supports SQL with compatibility for PostgreSQL and Azure Cosmos DB.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: PostgreSQL Hub for Azure Developers
item.description:
PostgreSQL Hub for Azure Developers is now generally available. It provides a centralized set of AI and application development resources for PostgreSQL on Azure, including sample apps, solution accelerators, tutorials, and learning paths.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Azure HorizonDB
item.description:
Azure HorizonDB is in public preview as a PostgreSQL-compatible database service. The preview highlights autoscaling storage up to 128 TB and claimed performance improvements over self-managed PostgreSQL.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: Retirement: Azure Cosmos DB for PostgreSQL will retire on March 31, 2029
item.description:
Azure Cosmos DB for PostgreSQL will be retired on March 31, 2029. Users must migrate to Azure Database for PostgreSQL Elastic Cluster before that date.

  • Source: Azure Updates
